title: 2 Pack Locking Luggage Strap - 2mm Thick Bright Color Suitcase Security Belt with Combination Lock
features: HIGH QUALITY STRAPS - Pack of 2 Heavy Duty Luggage Straps, Essential for Secure and Safe Travel
EASY TO FIND - Find your Suitcase Quickly and Easily among other Suitcases at a Collation Point or an Airport Carousel with these Bright Straps
HASSLE FREE COMBINATION LOCKS - Quality Combination Lock on Each Strap, Easy to Set & Comes with Simple Instructions so you can set the number you would like
HEAVY DUTY - 2mm Thick Webbing Straps are Stronger than a lot of other Luggage Straps on the Market - 50mm Wide, Easy to Adjust the Size - Extends up to 2 Meters to suit almost all Cases
PACK OF TWO STRAPS - Great to Secure a Suitcase both for Length and Width
